name: Mizuko
description:
A towering woman with blue skin and sharp yellow eyes. She has sharp pointed teeth, pointed ears, and two long blue horns jutting upwards out of her forehead, parting her long raven hair.

She's wearing a tiger print loincloth over her large hips with a small gourd tied to the side, and has a similarly styled cloth bra covering her breasts.
